resources.string: BMI, BSA, PASI — sounds intimidating, but we\'ll walk you through it.
Your history, your scores, your progress — right in your pocket.
A little info goes a long way toward making this truly yours.
We require a little more informations
Please provide all the required information to personalize your experience.
Please insert your full legal name.
Please specify your gender from those supported.

string-array.name: home_quotes
string-array.item: \"First, do no harm.\" — Hippocrates
\"Let food be thy medicine, and medicine be thy food.\" — Hippocrates
\"The greatest medicine of all is to teach people how not to need it.\" — Hippocrates
\"Medicine is not only a science; it is also an art. It does not consist of compounding pills and plasters; it deals with the very processes of life.\" — Paracelsus
\"The good physician treats the disease; the great physician treats the patient who has the disease.\" — William Osler
\"The art of medicine consists of amusing the patient while nature cures the disease.\" — Voltaire
\"An ounce of prevention is worth a pound of cure.\" — Benjamin Franklin
\"In medicine, as in life, the smallest details make the greatest difference.\" — Unknown
\"The skin is the fingerprint of what is going on inside the body.\" — Dr. Georgiana Donadio
\"Healthy skin is a reflection of overall wellness.\" — Dr. Howard Murad
\"The skin is the body\'s largest organ, and yet the most neglected.\" — Unknown
\"Your skin is a reflection of your overall health — treat it accordingly.\" — Unknown
\"Listen to your skin. It speaks before the rest of your body does.\" — Unknown
\"A dermatologist sees what others overlook — the stories written on skin.\" — Unknown
\"Your skin tone is not a condition to fix — it is a heritage to celebrate.\" — Unknown
\"The skin has memory. What you do today, your skin will remember in ten years.\" — Unknown
\"Sunscreen is the closest thing we have to a fountain of youth.\" — Dr. Patricia Wexler
\"SPF every day, rain or shine — UV rays do not take days off.\" — Unknown
\"UV radiation is the primary driver of premature skin aging. Protect yourself daily, without exception.\" — American Academy of Dermatology
\"Never ignore a mole that changes shape, color, or size. Early detection of melanoma saves lives.\" — Unknown
\"Check your skin monthly. Detect changes early — it could save your life.\" — American Academy of Dermatology
\"Retinoids remain the gold standard in anti-aging dermatology — backed by decades of clinical evidence.\" — Unknown
\"Gentle cleansing twice daily is the foundation of every effective skincare routine.\" — Unknown
\"Moisturize, protect, repeat. The holy trinity of skincare.\" — Unknown
\"A consistent skincare routine is an act of long-term self-respect.\" — Unknown
\"Never sleep with makeup on. Your skin repairs and regenerates itself overnight — let it.\" — Unknown
\"Hydration is the secret to glowing skin — drink water, do not just apply it.\" — Unknown
\"Antioxidants in your diet protect your skin from the inside out. Eat your colours.\" — Unknown
\"Stress shows on your skin before it shows anywhere else. Managing your mind is managing your complexion.\" — Unknown
\"Sleep is the best skincare product you will never pay for.\" — Unknown
\"Smoking ages the skin faster than the sun. No serum can undo what cigarettes do.\" — Unknown
\"Take care of your skin. It represents you every single day, to everyone you meet.\" — Unknown
